description: Pyreon-lint ratchet — @pyreon/lint advisory (warning + info) findings over framework `packages/*/src` may only DECREASE. A change pushing any rule above its baseline fails `bun scripts/check-pyreon-lint-ratchet.ts`. After fixing findings (or scoping a rule off for a package with rationale), tighten with `--update`. Never raise the baseline to absorb new findings. See .claude/rules/code-style.md (three-state model).
